title: calathea prolifera
intro: Calathea prolifera, also known as the Peacock Plant or Prayer Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Calathea prolifera include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, Calathea prolifera is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
